goalArchetypes.label: Budget Daily
goalArchetypes.description: Keep total spend controlled while improving reliability and feel.
nextSteps: Prioritize maintenance baseline before power mods.
Reserve at least 15% of budget for labor and alignment.
Validate part numbers with VIN before buying used.

goalArchetypes.label: Street Reliable
goalArchetypes.description: Balanced setup for everyday driving with confidence upgrades.
nextSteps: Focus on cooling, braking, and tire quality first.
Prefer proven bolt-ons with clear fitment documentation.
Keep emissions-compliant options for easier inspections.

goalArchetypes.label: Weekend Canyon
goalArchetypes.description: Sharper handling and stronger acceleration for spirited driving.
nextSteps: Add supporting suspension and alignment before higher-power upgrades.
Stagger mod installation to isolate tuning issues.
Plan brake fluid refresh before heavy mountain driving.

goalArchetypes.label: Track Ready
goalArchetypes.description: Heat and durability-focused package for repeated hard laps.
nextSteps: Start with consumables: tires, fluid, and pads.
Monitor temps and AFR before aggressive power goals.
Use a pre-event torque and fluid checklist every session.

goalArchetypes.label: Show Style
goalArchetypes.description: Visual impact plus drivability with select performance pieces.
nextSteps: Balance cosmetic parts with mechanical reliability upgrades.
Confirm wheel/tire clearance if ride height changes.
Budget for paint/body prep when buying used aero.

warnings: High-flow downpipe selected: tune support is required to avoid lean conditions.
Confirm local emissions legality before installing catalyst-adjacent parts.

rules.description: Stage 2 tune should include fueling and intercooler support.
warnings: Stage 2 calibration selected: add fueling, charge cooling, and wideband monitoring.

rules.description: Track builds must include brake fluid and pad baseline.
warnings: Track archetype requires fluid and pad prep before power-focused parts.

rules.description: Coilover installs need an alignment follow-up.
warnings: Coilovers selected: schedule a post-install alignment to prevent uneven wear.

rules.description: Low noise tolerance conflicts with loud exhaust setups.
warnings: Your noise tolerance is set to Low, but selected parts can increase cabin volume/NVH.

rules.description: CA region should avoid non-compliant catalyst changes.
warnings: California builds should verify CARB compliance before downpipe changes.

rules.description: Budget-aware warning when expensive parts exceed budget fit.
warnings: Selected high-ticket parts may exceed your stated budget once labor is included.
nextSteps: Consider phased installation: handling first, power second.
Use used-market targets and deal score to time purchases.

rules.description: OEM catted midpipe conflicts with high-flow downpipe.
warnings: OEM catted midpipe removed because it conflicts with the selected high-flow downpipe.

rules.description: OEM clutch and Stage 2 clutch are mutually exclusive.
warnings: OEM clutch kit removed because Stage 2 clutch is selected for higher torque load.
